name: search_news
description: Search news articles by keyword, date range, domain, language, and sort order.

query.description: Keywords or phrases to search for. Required.

domains.description: Comma-separated list of domains to restrict to (e.g. 'bbc.co.uk,cnn.com'). Optional.

language.description: Two-letter ISO language code (e.g. 'en'). Optional, defaults to all languages.

sort_by.description: Sort order: 'relevancy', 'popularity', or 'publishedAt'. Optional, defaults to 'publishedAt'.

count.description: Number of articles to return (1-20). Optional, defaults to 5.
